description_long: This object is a single slice of bread with a slightly irregular, rectangular shape and rounded corners. The top surface displays a mottled pattern of light and medium brown tones, indicating a toasted or baked finish, while the sides are a deeper brown, representing the crust. The surface texture appears soft and porous, with subtle undulations and a matte finish typical of sandwich bread. The edges are slightly raised and uneven, giving the slice a natural, hand-cut appearance. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring on the crust. The object is compact and flat, resembling a standard slice of white or wheat sandwich bread.
description: A single, slightly irregular slice of bread with a soft, porous top and a medium-brown crust. The surface is matte and gently undulating, with no visible seeds or flour.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, lightly browned top surface and the deep brown crust along the bottom edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the slice and the transition from the soft top to the darker crust.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the slightly indented bottom edge and the even distribution of crust around the slice.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizes the irregular, rounded corners and the natural, uneven edge of the bread.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is a continuous, medium to dark brown band around the edge, with a slightly rough and uneven texture. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative markings.
